description: Parse a combined featureCounts (Subread) matrix into a gene x sample integer counts matrix for PyDESeq2. Skips the leading '#' command line, drops the Geneid/Chr/Start/End/Strand/Length metadata columns, and cleans BAM-path sample names. Writes counts.csv (genes x samples) and metadata_template.csv.
rules: local analysis — reads the featureCounts matrix, writes counts.csv + metadata_template.csv under record_store
the first '#' line (the featureCounts command) is treated as a comment; the next row is the real header
counts are already integers; all-zero genes are dropped; never emits TPM/FPKM
needs only python3 + pandas — no aligner or science container required
usage: Set COUNTS_FILE (the combined featureCounts matrix). Output: counts/counts.csv + counts/metadata_template.csv.
limitation: featureCounts mode only. Expects the standard featureCounts column layout (Geneid,Chr,Start,End,Strand,Length,<bam>...).
